files.role: page shell, slots, CDN tags, script ordering
global styling, region distinction, desktop-first layout, stale marker

smoke_check: Open index.html in any modern desktop browser. The page renders with input on the left and output on the right. Type 'x^2 + y^2 = z^2' in the textarea — typeset math appears live in the output region. Type '\frac{1}{' — the error region appears in red with a non-empty parser message and the previous render is cleared/marked stale.
